response.overview: Adapted from the xianxia novel Heaven Official's Blessing by Mo Xiang Tong Xiu. The story follows Xie Lian, a fallen god who has been cast down from the heavens twice and now works as a scrap collector. After ascending to godhood for a third time, he encounters Hua Cheng, the ghost king who strikes fear into gods and demons alike. A story of devotion spanning 800 years.
response.title: 吉星高照
